title: Senior Java Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced Java developer to join our backend team. You will be working on microservices architecture using Spring Boot, designing RESTful APIs, and implementing scalable solutions. Experience with Kubernetes and cloud platforms is a plus.

title: Frontend React Developer
description: Join our fast-paced startup as a React developer. You will build beautiful user interfaces, work with TypeScript, and collaborate closely with our design team. We use modern tools like Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Looking for a DevOps engineer to manage our CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and cloud infrastructure. You will work with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and AWS services to ensure reliable deployments.

title: Junior Python Developer
description: Great opportunity for a junior developer to learn and grow. You will work on data processing pipelines using Python, learn about machine learning basics, and collaborate with senior engineers on exciting projects.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We need a full stack developer who can handle both frontend and backend development. You will use React for the frontend and Node.js for the backend, working on client projects across various industries.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our AI team to build and deploy machine learning models at scale. You will work on NLP, computer vision, and recommendation systems using Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. PhD preferred.

title: Java Backend Developer
description: Work on our core banking platform using Java and Spring Framework. You will build secure, high-performance APIs for financial transactions. Experience with payment systems is highly valued.

title: Contract iOS Developer
description: 6-month contract for an iOS developer to help build our new mobile application. Swift experience required. You will implement new features, fix bugs, and improve app performance.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: We need an SRE to ensure 99.99% uptime for our distributed systems. You will implement monitoring, alerting, and incident response. Experience with Prometheus, Grafana, and PagerDuty is essential.

title: Part-Time Technical Writer
description: Looking for a technical writer to create API documentation, user guides, and tutorials. You will work closely with developers to understand complex systems and explain them clearly.

title: Lead Software Architect
description: We are seeking a software architect to lead the design of our next-generation platform. You will make critical technology decisions, mentor teams, and ensure system scalability and security.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain our data infrastructure using Apache Spark, Kafka, and Airflow. You will design ETL pipelines, optimize data storage, and ensure data quality across the organization.

title: Security Engineer
description: Join our security team to protect our infrastructure and applications. You will conduct security assessments, implement security controls, and respond to incidents. CISSP certification preferred.

title: Android Developer Intern
description: Summer internship for computer science students interested in Android development. You will learn Kotlin, work on real projects, and be mentored by experienced developers.

title: Go Backend Developer
description: We are building high-performance microservices in Go. You will design concurrent systems, optimize for low latency, and work with gRPC and Protocol Buffers.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Develop and maintain automated test suites using Selenium and Cypress. You will implement CI/CD test pipelines and ensure product quality through comprehensive testing strategies.

title: Platform Engineer
description: Build internal developer platforms to accelerate software delivery. You will create Kubernetes operators, Helm charts, and self-service infrastructure tools for engineering teams.

title: Database Administrator
description: Manage and optimize our PostgreSQL and MySQL databases. You will handle replication, backup strategies, performance tuning, and ensure high availability for mission-critical systems.

title: Rust Systems Programmer
description: Work on systems programming projects in Rust. You will build high-performance, memory-safe software for embedded systems and infrastructure tooling.

title: Technical Project Manager
description: Lead cross-functional teams to deliver software projects on time. You will manage sprints, remove blockers, and communicate progress to stakeholders. PMP or CSM certification preferred.
